briefdescription.para: Multiple code points that form one combined text input.

memberdef.argsstring: (Type type, char32_t codePoint=0, KeyModifiers modifiers={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: Key

briefdescription.para: Create a key with an explicit type and optional Unicode payload.

parameterdescription.para: The modifiers pressed together with this key.

briefdescription.para: Create a special key with modifiers.

parameterdescription.para: The modifiers pressed together with this key.
The modifiers pressed together with this key.

briefdescription.para: Create a key with an explicit combined Unicode payload.

parameterdescription.para: The combined Unicode text for Type::Character or Type::Combined.
The modifiers pressed together with this key.
If character is not a supported Unicode character sequence.

briefdescription.para: Compare two key events for equality.
Compare against a single code point.

detaileddescription.para: This requires type() == Character and unicode() == other.

briefdescription.para: Compare against a combined key This requires type() == Combined and combined() == other.

detaileddescription.para: This requires type() == type and type != Character|Combined.

briefdescription.para: Get the modifiers pressed together with this key.
Test if a modifier is set.
Create a copy of this key without modifiers.

xrefdescription.para: Use unicode() or combined() to support full Unicode input.

simplesect.para: The ASCII character for single-code-point character input, otherwise 0.

briefdescription.para: Get the Unicode code point for Type::Character.

simplesect.para: The single Unicode code point, or 0 if this key does not store exactly one code point.

briefdescription.para: Get the full combined Unicode payload for character input.

simplesect.para: The stored Unicode text, or an empty string for non-character keys.

briefdescription.para: Test if this object represents a supported key.
Get a hash for this key.
Convert the key to configuration text.
Convert the key to human-readable display text.

parameterdescription.para: If true, wrap the text in [ and ].

simplesect.para: The display text for prompts and help texts.

briefdescription.para: Decode a key from the configuration text.

simplesect.para: The decoded key, or Type::None if the text is unsupported.

briefdescription.para: Decode a key from console input text.

parameterdescription.para: The input text or escape sequence.

simplesect.para: The decoded key, or Type::None if the input is unsupported.

briefdescription.para: Get the canonical text definitions for special keys.
Get the accepted alias definitions for parsing key names.
Find the display and serialization text for a special key.
Normalize a key name for case-insensitive alias matching.
Remove parsed modifiers from the beginning of a key string.
Append modifier configuration text to a string.
Append modifier display text to a string.
Wrap display text in square brackets when requested.
Create a character or combined key from normalized Unicode input.
Parse Unicode text into a character key when possible.
A simple representation of a key press.

detaileddescription.para: Supports Unicode text input and common special keys.
